Impact & sustainability

Protecting the people and places that make travel possible

Travel as a catalyst for positive change

As global travel expands, so does our responsibility to shape a more sustainable travel industry. Our Journey for Good is how we’re building a responsible marketplace that strengthens communities and economies while protecting the awe-inspiring places that make travel meaningful.

Resources

Global Impact Report

Discover how we’re taking care of our people, planet, and the places we visit.

Read the report

Our Journey for Good

Explore how we're helping make the world a better place for all.

  • Sustainability
  • Social impact
  • Governance

Sustainability

Safeguarding the places we love

A healthier planet helps keep travel vibrant. We’re guiding our business toward net zero, empowering travelers to make more sustainable choices, and encouraging partners to offer options that help protect the places we explore.

 

Read the climate action plan

Aligning with a net-zero future

We’re working to decarbonize our operations to mitigate and adapt to the impacts of climate change on our business.

Powering more sustainable travel

We’re actively giving travelers more sustainable options and supporting suppliers in the goal to reach Net Zero targets by 2050.

Committed to a better future

90%

reduction in operations and supply chain emissions by 2040

75%

reduction in office and corporate emissions by 2030

78%

of suppliers required to have set science-based targets by 2028

50%

increase in hotels with sustainability certifications on our platforms*

Social impact

Empowering communities around the world

We deliver positive impact for the communities where we live, work, and operate through long-term partnerships, philanthropy, and programs that foster responsible stewardship of tourism.

Partnering with Destination Organizations

Partnering with destination organizations, we co-fund community-led initiatives and offer free climate training through The Travel Foundation. Together, we're building long-term climate resilience and creating real benefits for local residents.

Learn more

Employee Giving & Volunteering

Through volunteering and our annual “Month of Caring”, teams are encouraged to give back to causes that matter most to them. Whether that means local clean-up days, or support for housing, education, and essential services, we’re on it.

Learn more

Nature Positive Tourism Fund

By advancing community-led tourism with the Wildlife Conservation Society, we’re facilitating conservation efforts, building climate resilience, and helping local communities thrive.

Learn more

Elliot Bay Connections

Our Seattle HQ transformed a former industrial waterfront into restored meadows and public parkland. As a founding partner of Elliott Bay Connections, we’re helping revitalize public spaces and improving access to nature.

Learn more
$16M

in philanthropic funding*

+28K

hours of employee volunteering*

100+

destinations increased climate capacity**

Governance

Embedding responsibility into our business

We’re scaling our business responsibly so the people we meet and the places we visit remain vibrant and resilient for generations to come.

Upholding human rights

As a platform connecting the global travel industry, we recognize the vital importance of upholding human rights standards worldwide. We prohibit all forms of modern slavery, servitude, forced labor, and human trafficking, and work to ensure all people are treated with dignity and respect.  

Learn more in our Human Rights Statement, Modern Slavery Statement, Vendor Code of Conduct, and latest Impact Report.

Where we stand

Learn more about our stance on topics that matter.

Disclosures
Australia & UK Modern Slavery Statement
California Assembly Bill 1305 Statement

Ready to make a positive impact?

Travel

Travel with us

Whether it’s the trip of a lifetime, a weekend escape, or an ambitious business itinerary, we’re here to help you travel the world with confidence.

Explore our brands

Partnership

Partner with us

Join a thriving network of partners around the world. Discover how an Expedia Group partnership can help empower your travel business. 

Join us

Careers

Work with us

Join a community of travelers and technologists that connect time zones, hemispheres, cultures, and languages.

View careers

Past initiatives

Designed to help travel startups and small businesses take off, our Accelerator Program provided mentorship, technology access, and funding to fast-track  growth. The program focused heavily on removing barriers to travel, improving experiences for people with accessibility needs, and enhancing safety and inclusivity.

Our Made to Travel Fund partnered with nonprofits and impact-driven organizations through a dedicated grant program. Funding helped actively remove barriers for underrepresented communities and created real opportunities for more people to explore the globe.

*In FY25
**via Destination Climate Champions Training in FY25
